vocab.example: Strategically placing a mirror can completely alter the spatial perception of a narrow corridor.
I would opt for a frameless mirror to maintain a minimalist aesthetic in my study.
Mirrors are excellent tools to diffuse light into the gloomier corners of a living area.

vocab.meaning: sự thú vị/cuốn hút về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: Grouping several small, antique mirrors together creates a lot of visual intrigue on a plain wall.
Decorative pieces with convex surfaces can add a quirky, artistic touch to a modern room.

vocab.meaning: điểm nhấn trung tâm của nội thất
vocab.example: A sunburst mirror often serves as the primary focal point of the interior in contemporary homes.
The reflective property of glass helps to brighten up a room that lacks large windows.

vocab.meaning: áp sát/bằng phẳng với mặt tường
vocab.example: I prefer mirrors that sit flush against the wall for a sleek and integrated look.

vocab.meaning: lớp nhuốm màu thời gian/vết bóng cổ kính
vocab.example: I love mirrors with a slight vintage patina on the frame to add character to my bedroom.
Using a pair of identical mirrors can establish a sense of geometric symmetry and balance in the decor.
